All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

N

nextTurn() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameModel
The nextTurn() method updates the value of the currentTurn attribute, that contains the Player that is currently playing his turn.
nextTurn() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Changes the turn to the next player.
NoCardsException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.exceptions
the NoCardsException is a class that represents an Exception in case there's no cards left in the deck.
NoCardsException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.exceptions.NoCardsException
NoCardsException is a setter method of the exception, which gives the message to send and calls the method of the super class.
NOT_TURN - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in the state of waiting for the other players to do their turn.
NOTIFY - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
NOTIFY message type
NotifyMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed
This message is sent by the server to the client when a player joins the lobby.
NotifyMessage(MessageId, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.NotifyMessage
Constructor.
notifyPlayer(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the notifyPlayer method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
notifyPlayer(String) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the notifyPlayer method sends to the player confirmations about the previews action of the player, for example if the player has drawn a card, if he has placed a card, if he has chosen the objectives, if he has chosen his token or if it's his turn.
notifyTurn(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the notifyTurn method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
notifyTurn(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the notifyTurn method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
notifyTurn(Player) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the notifyTurn method is called to notify a player his turn.
NowUnavailableMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization
This message is sent to the client when a token is no longer available.
NowUnavailableMessage(MessageId, String, Token) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.NowUnavailableMessage
Constructor of the class.
nowUnavailableToken(Player, Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the nowUnavailableToken method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
nowUnavailableToken(Player, Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the nowUnavailableToken method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
nowUnavailableToken(Player, Token) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the nowUnavailableToken method is called to set up the token of the player.
